Products

Modular Air Handing Unit :

Modular Air Handling Unit achieves high standards in quality, performance, flexibility, reliability, energy efficiency, and cleanliness. The unit can provide customize system application solutions according to the needs of user, meeting customers’ personalized requirements. There are multiple functional sections to choose from to meet various air treatment requirements.

Aluminum structure provides excellent corrosion resistance. A durable and sustainable material, it can reduce overall unit weight by as much as 40% thus reducing structural support cost.

TECH FREE Aluminum structure had been tested under EN1886:2007 & AHRI 1350.

Mini Air handling Unit :

Constructed with Anodized Aluminum Casing, 30mm PU insulation gives lighter weight and better durability. Variable speed EC fan can save max. 20-30% energy by changing it output subject to actual airflow demand. Max airflow up to 2500 CFM and static pressure 450Pa allows long ductworks or addition filtration applications. Slim size with just 450mm height fits compact ceiling and 4 Rows coil configuration could give better performance on handling fresh air compare to tradition FCU.

Suitable for Malls, Atrium, Hospitals and Lobby etc.

HEAT PIPE UNIT / FRESH AIR HANDLING UNIT :

The application of Heat Pipe in Air handling unit is a good choice for fresh air handling.

TECH FREE Heat Pipe uses temperature difference of the environment and unique tube circuit design to obtain energy for the removal of moisture, pre-cool and re-heat of air.

Heat Recovery type and Dehumidification type are both ideal for air treatment, especially fresh air without the use of any electrical energy. Traditional horizontal or New vertical configuration is available for Heat Recovery Type.

Hygienic Air Handling Unit :

Hygienic Air Handling Unit: all internal surfaces are made of Stainless Steel and Anti Corrosion treatment, dirt and germs are easily cleaned on smooth and flat surfaces. Units are certified with VDI 6022 .1. Suitable for hygiene environment, such as hospitals, food factories and pharmaceutical plants etc.

INTEGRATED AIR HANDLING UNIT (MiMEP) :

Apply “MiMEP – Multi-trade integrated Mechanical, Electrical & Plumbing” – Combining system of Power/ Control Panel and Water Side Accessories on the Air Handling Unit gives it an advantage of“Plug & Play”installation on site.

Integrated Air Handling Unit requires comprehensive consideration from the design stage to site installation thus minimizing on-site co-ordination.

Integrated Air Handling Unit has obtained the national patent (Patent No. ZL202022480496.0).

DUAL SYSTEM HEAT RECOVERY UNIT :

In many application, poor dehumidification performance is mainly caused by high inlet chilled water temperature.

TECH FREE Dual System Heat Recovery Air Handling Unit provide sub-cooling and reheat. Sub-cooling to ensure moisture removal and reheat to control relative humidity.

Reheat is crucial to obtaining desired humidity by sensible heating, heat recovery in the system greatly reduces energy use and allows control of indoor environment in a more effective way.

With the aid of software program control, energy regulating valve and accessories, precise temperature and humidity can be achieved. Dual System Unit can be operated simultaneously or independently, flexible system with wide range of indoor condition requirements.

Variable Refrigerant Flow Air Handling Unit :

Direct Expansion Air Handling Unit equipped with Variable Speed Drive Compressor can regulate system capacity to cooling load demand. Energy and system efficient, it can be customized to integrate Fresh Air, Heat Pump and Heat recovery System increasing design flexibility and functionality.

Packaged Rooftop Unit :

TECH FREE Packaged Rooftop Unit is equipped with the industry-leading R410A scroll compressor, making it a versatile choice for a wide range of applications, including commercial, industrial, institutional, transportation, and specialized buildings.

This unit boasts several key features, including energy efficiency, quiet operation, minimal vibration, high static pressure capability, precise control, reliability, corrosion resistance, excellent sealing against the elements, and easy outdoor installation. It is air-cooled, making it particularly suitable for regions where water sources are limited.

AIR HANDLING UNIT / PRE-COOLING AIR HANDLING UNIT :

Air Handling Unit, Penta post Al framework with double skin PU insulation, unique thermo break structure to eliminate formation of “cold bridge”. Fire Rated Class UL94V0. PVC gasket and cubical design keep air tightness with air leakage rate <0.4l/s.sqm. Powder coated casing enhances the resistant against corrosion and UV. Capacity from 3TR – 110TR.

Ceiling (C) / Vertical (P) / Horizontal (H) configurations available. Unit structure comply to EN1886:2007

ACOUSTIC EC FAN CUBE MODULE : Acoustic EC Fan Cube Module has obtained the national patent.

Patent No.：ZL 2022 2 1885833.7(Authorized by CNIPA)

Acoustic EC Fan Cube Module with sound insulation panel which have good heat insulation, high sound absorption effect. After laboratory test, it is proved to have effective on low frequency sound absorption and sound insulation.

Free combination, compact design
High efficiency operation
Modular design and Easy Assembly
Improve mechanical reliability and reduce vibration
Quiet Operation and provide redundancy

DRY COOLER :

TFDC Dry Cooler is using water and glycol solution as cooling media. The heat rejection of single unit from 15KW – 250KW. Modular or single unit subjects to footprint. Powder coated G.l. sheet gives high resistant against corrosion and UV. Epoxy coating / Hot hip coating treatment / copper fins are optional for corrosive condition. Integrated control for heat rejection capacity is also available.

AIR COOLED CONDENSING UNIT :

Air Cooled Condensing Unit, with superior performance and reliability, universal various refrigerant, suitable for all freezing and air conditioning system. It is a flexible and typical solution, which is widely used in comfortable central air conditioning systems such as hotel, hospital, shopping mall, office, exhibition hall, airport, stadium and other comfortable central air conditioning systems, and can also be used in the laboratory, constant temperature and humidity and other precision control process systems.

COILS : Coils are selected according AHRI 410 standard, constructed with seamless copper tube and mechanically boned to waved fins. Its advantages are high thermal conductivity, low pressure drop and less scaling. Copper Fin / Epoxy coating Fins and S/S frame are optional for corrosive environment. Water Coil / Condenser Coil and Dx Coil are available.

FRESH AIR UNIT / EXHAUST AIR UNIT :

TFF series Fresh Air Unit / Exhaust Air Unit has the advantages of compact structure, high reliability, simple installation, easy installation and maintenance, low noise, stable operation, high temperature resistance, etc.

Its performance index reaches the international advanced level, which can be widely used in the ventilation and exhaust of Restaurants, Hotels, Office buildings, Theaters, Commercial buildings, Shopping malls, Hospitals, Basements, etc. Moreover, it can also be used as the ventilation of general factory.

Fresh air unit / Exhaust Air Unit is mainly divided into two types: Standard type and Deluxe type.

AIR PURIFIER : AIR PURIFIER model: KJ310G-A02

UV section

Double disinfection without any dead zone

The built-in ultraviolet germicidal lamp and negative ion function can effectively disinfect and sterilize to completely eliminate pollution, so as to keep clean in life.

Filters section

Triple filters for multiplied purification

It effectively removes such pathogens as viruses, bacteria and pollen by filtration and adsorbs such harmful organic substances as formaldehyde to fully protect your family’s health.

  • Fitted with a primary filter to pre-filter the larger visible impurities in the air.
  • Fitted with H12 grade HEPA filters to efficiently remove particulate pollutants and intercept virus aerosols, to protect respiratory health.
  • Fitted with an activated carbon filter made of high-quality columnar activated carbons, with a large surface area, greater pore structures, a strong adsorption capacity, uniform particle distribution and

high wear resistance for better adsorption, so as to greatly improve its purification capacity and effectively remove formaldehyde and odors to supply fresh air for better health.

Super-Quiet Duct Ventilators : Duct Ventilators: DP series

Casing

  • Metal casing made of high-quality spangle-free* galvanized plate, with higher corrosion resistance — Corrosion endurance duration exceeding 150 Hr. in NSS test.

Part and components

  • All parts and components can be maintained, inspected and repaired without dismounting the whole machine but dismounting the side cover only.

Noise

  • Using high-quality sound-absorptive materials and optimize design of blades and air channels — Noise as low as 16 dB.

Installation

Can be installed on Lifting/mounting in front position and Lifting/mounting in side position.

5 year warranty for motor.

  • Long-life IP44 motor
  • Low noise

CABINET FRESH AIR SYSTEM :

CABINET FRESH AIR SYSTEM : X-series

  • Large air volume and Sufficient fresh air for large space.
  • Smart home Remote control with your mobile phone.High definition for clear display. Real-time monitoring of air quality (PM2.5 CO2)
  • Low energy consumption Using the air to air heat exchanger to save energy.DC motor saving electric power by up to 30%.
  • Triple filters for efficient cleaning G4 Primary filter.F7 Medium filter.H13 HEPA filter.
